fragments.plaintext: We’ll go first: 🤯

Tea Is Served 🎾

Congratulations Diede de Groot, @Tokitooda, and Niels Vink on an incredible week of becoming champions in London. The grass is greener when you’re taking home a major title 🏆

fragments.plaintext:
The Alcaraz Era is upon us.
 
An age in which age doesn’t matter and impossible shots are served with a smile 😏
 
Congrats Carlos Alcaraz, youngest world no.1, on major no.2.
 
Your time has only just begun.

fragments.plaintext: The All-American Hero. Legendary forward
@mrapinoe
is on her last trip to the big stage looking for a three-peat with the
@uswnt
. Let it rip!

caption.text: The All-American Hero. Legendary forward @mrapinoe is on her last trip to the big stage looking for a three-peat with the @uswnt. Let it rip!

link_preview_attachment.title: She’s got the touch. She’s got the power. She’s got the… keytar solo?   When @uswnt forward Megan Rapinoe takes the pitch to chase three-peat history on the big stage, you know she’s gonna let it rip. Check @mrapinoe the All-American Hero. #JustDoIt #NikeFC

fragments.plaintext:
Play With Heart.

China midfielder Wang Shuang’s playing style is all ❤️‍🔥. That’s why she follows it around the world from Paris to Wuhan to Louisville, Kentucky and beyond. 
#JustDoIt #NikeFC
